description: yle NoteThese tops are this season's winners because of the use of simple styling techniques that spruce up the entire look without going overboard. Summery and cool, this top from wills lifestyle can be worn with trousers or shorts for a look that's sure to make heads turn.  Product DetailsWhite sleeveless top, has a round neckline with ruffles and decorative trims around it, pint tucks on the shoulders and yoke with lace detailing, a full buttoned placket with decorative trim on it, back yoke with a lace detail and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care100% ramieMachine wash coldDo not bleachLine dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model height (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S White sleeveless top, has a round neckline with ruffles and decorative trims around it, pin tucks on the shoulders and yoke with lace detailing, a full buttoned placket with decorative trim on it, back yoke with a lace detail and a curved hemline
